response.justification: Bogdan has over a decade of software engineering experience with strong leadership, mentoring, and distributed systems skills. However, he does not meet the critical minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing less than a year of professional C++ experience. Furthermore, his background is predominantly in full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than the low-level cloud compute platform infrastructure and hardware architecture required for this role.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring experience, including Staff-level roles and organizing coding dojos and technical workshops.
Strong background in software design, architecture, and establishing engineering best practices like TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
Solid experience with distributed systems and microservices handling high traffic, particularly in roles at Dunnhumby and Shopify.
concerns: Significantly falls short of the minimum 8 years of C++ programming requirement, with only about 7 months of professional C/C++ experience listed.
Technical stack heavily leans toward full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript, React) rather than low-level cloud compute platform infrastructure.
Lacks deep, production-level experience managing compute technologies, storage, and hardware architecture at scale.
